agents.name: Atlas
agents.blurb: The conversational front. Talks to the operator, holds personal-context memory, and delegates to the specialists. Atlas's primary push channel is a messaging app, with a fallback channel behind it. An SMS / voice bridge is built and gated -- once armed, calling or texting reaches the same agent, with Atlas as the brain behind the call.

agents.name: Aurora
agents.blurb: Daily digest from email, calendar, memory and your health data, delivered to your phone. Anything it reports as shipped is backed by a verified receipt, not a claim.

agents.name: Envoy
agents.blurb: Outbound action chain with per-recipient memory. Every send passes through Sentinel first.

agents.name: Horizon
agents.blurb: Read-only calendar access. Lists, searches and reads events; the write tools are stripped from its loadout.

agents.name: Pulse
agents.blurb: Personal health-log curator. Append-only journaling from your wearable; sensitive-tier by default.

agents.name: Relay
agents.blurb: The traffic controller for every request. It checks that each message is well-formed and permitted before passing it along, and turns away anything that looks suspicious.

agents.name: Scout
agents.blurb: Reads incoming email safely and files what matters — without ever acting on instructions found inside a message.

agents.name: Sentinel
agents.blurb: The approval gate. Tier-based: routine auto-approves, sensitive escalates to the operator's phone for a one-tap decision, system-tier identity edits require a one-time code.

agents.name: Steward
agents.blurb: Self-modification audit + plan author. Diagnoses incidents and drafts fix plans for the Sentinel queue.

agents.name: Verdict
agents.blurb: Paste a marketplace listing for a fair-price read and a scam-risk flag. Estimates only -- never messages a seller or moves money.

agents.name: Concierge
agents.blurb: "Find a Mexican place near home", "plan this errand route". Backed by a maps and places provider, it geocodes against a discard-after-use home base and is held to a hard daily cap. Locked to an exec allowlist of a few scripts -- no web, mail or shell beyond them. Trip planning is folded in: it builds itineraries and surfaces booking deep-links, and never books for you.

agents.name: Perks
agents.blurb: Knows every perk on the cards in your wallet. Ask "which card for this purchase?" and it answers from the fine print -- including which statement credits you haven't used yet. Read-only: it advises, never spends.
